evidence: Modular architecture created and executed directly via standard Python entry points.
AutoGen multiple-agent topology implemented correctly using RoundRobinGroupChat.
Integrated custom MockChatCompletionClient, proving self-correction and API fallback behavior for independent IDE operations.

modules.name: MockChatCompletionClient
modules.description: Provides local testing fallback by mocking OpenAI ChatCompletionClient interface to comply with CreateResult schema and avoid 401 exceptions.

modules.name: IDEWorkflowManager
modules.description: Encapsulates workflow setup, including 'Developer' and 'Reviewer' agents. Orchestrates via RoundRobinGroupChat and custom termination conditions (MaxMessageTermination | TextMentionTermination).

decision_rules: Use MockChatCompletionClient to avoid unauthenticated API crashes during local testing.
Wrap agent group chats inside classes such as IDEWorkflowManager for high modularity.
Employ MaxMessageTermination paired with TextMentionTermination to ensure bounded iterations.

next_suggestion: In the next iteration, add automated code execution to the 'Developer' agent using LocalCommandLineCodeExecutor.
